author: Marwan Luay
description: Open, view, and edit DOCX and PPTX files directly in your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Mars
manifest.description: Open, search, and edit DOCX and PPTX files directly in your vault.
manifest.name: Native PowerPoint Doc Editor

name: Native PowerPoint Doc Editor

releases.author: MarsLuay
releases.description:
## 1.1.0

Version bump on the stable 1.0.44 main line.

Nightly work remains on `nightly-releases` only and is not included in this release.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MarsLuay/NativePowerPointDocEditor/compare/1.0.48...1.1.0

releases.author: MarsLuay
releases.description:
## 1.0.50 (nightly)

### Fixed
- Multi-select move now live-previews selected shapes with the selection outline (not outline-only).

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MarsLuay/NativePowerPointDocEditor/compare/1.0.49...1.0.50

releases.author: MarsLuay
releases.description:
## Changed

### Changed

- Catalog mirror Option A: public packages are **JS-only** (no package `.d.ts` / `types` fields). Sync drops decls; types stay in the vault. Code-analysis fails catalog-shaped trees that still ship package declarations (`catalog/dts-not-excluded`). Sanitized public `.d.ts` retired.
- Catalog surface build skips `tsc` (`scripts/typecheck-for-surface.mjs`) so clean clones typecheck-free via esbuild against package JS.
- Drop leftover Option A / agent hygiene: ambient-stub `rmSync`, `docs/AGENT-API.md` exclude/gitignore, hazard scanners + async catalog check wrapper, empty `dist/agent`, stale `./agent` docs.
- Remove always-error MCP mutation stubs (`docx_insert_text` / replace / delete / format / apply_style, `docx_insert_variable`). Drop `@eigenpal/docx-editor-agents` package rows from local READMEs / changeset fixed set.

releases.author: MarsLuay
releases.description:
Fix PPTX layout-background rendering so slide images no longer appear as full-slide artifacts. Align PPTX chrome/save-status styling with DOCX and route DOCX settings to plugin settings.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MarsLuay/NativePowerPointDocEditor/compare/1.0.32...1.0.33

releases.author: MarsLuay
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fixed lint/static-analysis warnings around popout-safe DOM/timer use, unsafe font attribute reads, unnecessary assertions, deprecated APIs, and command IDs.
- Removed stylesheet `!important` usage and tightened the theme CSS guard so future uses fail.
- Added issue/PR templates plus code of conduct and security policy metadata.
- Kept `pptx-svg` pinned at `0.5.10`; `0.6.2` failed highlight/run-property regression tests during verification.

## Verification
- `npm run build`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm test` (216/216)
- `node --test scripts/smoke-native-powerpoint-doc-editor-load.cjs`
- `scripts/code-analysis/run-code-analysis.mjs /tmp/native-powerpoint-doc-editor-push` (45/45 pass)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Native PowerPoint Doc Editor 1.0.5 cleans up community review recommendations and keeps the release metadata complete.

Changes:
- Adds a contributing guide for setup, testing, release expectations, and data-safety reporting.
- Uses Obsidian popout-safe document access for DOCX and PowerPoint UI work.
- Replaces direct HTMLElement checks with cross-window-safe DOM guards.
- Removes unnecessary type assertions reported by the community scanner.
- Replaces CSS selectors/properties that raised compatibility warnings while preserving editor menu behavior.
- Keeps release assets limited to main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css.
